overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a white-haired warrior walking through a moonlit coastal village and into surrounding rocky wilderness. The scene features medieval stone and timber architecture, glowing fireflies, and transitions from wooden docks to forest trails under a cloudy night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden fishing dock extending over calm water

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden dock away from the village toward the open water

entered.detail: small stone building with wooden roof at the dock entrance
weathered wooden planks forming the pier walkway
large fortified structure with towers visible across the water
dark silhouetted mountains against the cloudy night sky
still water reflecting the moonlight between the dock planks

segments.scene_description: The character walks away from a stone boathouse along a wooden pier extending over calm water. The wide-open scene reveals distant fortified islands and mountain ranges under a cloudy night sky, with glowing particles floating in the air.

scene_state.functional_zone: village waterfront with stone and timber buildings

events.description: character turns around to head back toward the village shore

agents.ego_description: turning around and walking back along the dock toward the village buildings

entered.detail: cluster of wooden and stone buildings with lit windows
stacked wooden barrels on the dockside

segments.scene_description: After reaching the end of the pier, the character turns and walks back toward the village. The stone boathouse approaches on the right while village houses become visible on the left, with the wooden dock planks continuing underfoot.

scene_state.functional_zone: village edge transitioning to rocky hillside

events.description: moving from wooden dock onto dirt path between stone cottages
passing the last village building and entering the rocky wilderness

agents.ego_description: walking up the dirt path away from the waterfront, passing stone cottages and entering the rocky hills

entered.detail: small stone house with wooden roof and stairs
large moss-covered boulders and rock formations
dense evergreen trees covering the hillside
stone steps leading up to a cottage entrance

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the wooden dock to a dirt trail, walking uphill between stone cottages and rocky outcrops. The environment shifts from the open waterfront to an enclosed path with increasing vegetation and rock formations.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky mountain trail with dense forest

events.description: passing through a narrow rocky gap with red flowering bushes on the left

agents.ego_description: navigating the winding trail through the narrow rocky passage and dense forest

entered.detail: tight corridor between high rock walls with trail winding through
vibrant red flowers growing on the rocky slope
natural stone arch formation visible through the trees

segments.scene_description: The trail narrows significantly as the character enters a rocky gorge with dense forest vegetation. The path winds between tall rock walls and pine trees, passing red flowering bushes as the terrain becomes increasingly rugged and enclosed.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from an open, moonlit waterfront into a rugged, enclosed rocky gorge. It begins with the character walking away from a stone boathouse along a wooden pier, revealing distant fortified islands and mountains under a cloudy night sky filled with glowing particles. As the character reaches the end of the pier and turns back, the perspective shifts toward the village houses and the boathouse on the right. The scene then moves from the wooden planks onto a rising dirt trail, where the open horizon is replaced by stone cottages and rocky outcrops. Finally, the path narrows and winds deeper into a dense forest, passing red flowering bushes between tall rock walls and pine trees as the terrain becomes increasingly rugged.
